about.textContent:
👋 Hello, I'm Ramiro. As a technology enthusiast and web developer, I have focused on acquiring knowledge to become a Frontend Developer. Although my education includes courses in Python, Django and Java focused on Back End development, my true passion lies in creating interactive and engaging user experiences.
I am not only looking for job opportunities, but also the opportunity to continue learning and growing in the technology industry. My goal is to apply both my academic knowledge and self-taught skills to real-world projects. I firmly believe that continuous learning is key to staying current in an environment as dynamic as web development.
In this constantly evolving and growing world, I have discovered the value of connections and partnerships with other experts. Sometimes the answer to a question is not only in the code, but also in the community we are a part of. In this regard, I am willing to share my experience and eager to benefit from any constructive feedback. ❤

VideoConverter.title: VideoConverter
VideoConverter.description: Convert YouTube Video ID to Mp3
